title: Knarf
description: A modpack that contains some of Knarfy's mods (no longer updating)
body:
A modpack perfect for Knarfy fans including a mixture of Knarfy's mods depending on the version of the modpack. It also contains their required mods.

There are 2 ways to play - with just Knarfy's mods or  with extra mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker).

- Download **versionName** to play with just Knarfy's mods.
- Download **versionName+** to play with the extra mods (default download).

## 🛠️ Mods in Each Versions
- **All** -> Broken Mobs resource pack.
- **1.20.1** -> Barns and Nobles, Dumb Potions (Fabric Only) and Dumb Enchants.
- **1.21.1** -> Dumb Foods 2, Dumb Weapons, Nobody Asked, Too Many Bricks.

## ⚠️ Warnings 

- Updating any of the mods may break stuff like updating EMF and ETF will break the Barns and Nobles mobs textures when Broken Mobs is on.
- Any forge versions use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) so may not work as intended.

## 📝 Notes
- The Resource Pack says its for a Newer Version of Minecraft but it does still work.

![Broken Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3YWtU5tT/images/6af51d5398a4449a2f95d173ad0cadad16ed742b.png)

- Some of the potion effect icons are broken but the effects themselves are fine.

For more info on the mods watch these videos [[here]](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXSrR2WU5qPlQ0OunTeKFs4y0OfXcsJak&si=iAK9EWpur2HgzCO6).

For more info on the custom recipes (1.21.1) read this [[here]](https://modrinth.com/mod/knarfrecipeaddon)
